creator: shige@FreeBSD.org
text:
From: takehiro@coral.ocn.ne.jp
Subject: ports/15900: ports/japanese/emacs20-dl-wnn6 needs to specify USE_XPG4
Date: Tue,  4 Jan 2000 23:11:50 -0800 (PST)

takehiro> >Description:
takehiro> When invoking emacs-dl-20.4,it complains "locale not supported ...." 
takehiro> because of not linked libxpg4.
takehiro> >How-To-Repeat:
takehiro> everytime emacs-dl-20.4(compiled using ports/japanese/emacs20-dl-wnn6)
takehiro> invoked.
takehiro> >Fix:
takehiro> Please define USE_XPG4 when emacs-dl-20 is built(for dependency).
takehiro> I think those who using emacs20-dl-wnn6 use ja_JP.EUC locale.
takehiro> Thanks!!

Only to define USE_XPG4 variable have no effect.
Please set "YES" or "yes" to USE_XPG4 when you compile at 
japanese/emacs20-dl-wnn6.

If you do so, libxpg4 will be linked to emacs-dl-20.x and emacs-20.x binaries.
Please try this.

If there is no problem, I'll close this PR. Ok?

--- shige (Shigeyuki Fukushima) <shige@FreeBSD.ORG>
